evals.prompt: I'm getting 'Failed to apply plugin org.jetbrains.kotlin.android' after upgrading to AGP 9. What's wrong?
evals.expected_output: AGP 9 includes built-in Kotlin support. Remove the org.jetbrains.kotlin.android plugin from your build.gradle — it's no longer needed and conflicts with built-in Kotlin.

evals.prompt: What steps do I need to follow to migrate my Android project to AGP 9?
evals.expected_output: Update dependencies (KSP 2.3.6+, Hilt 2.59.2+), migrate to built-in Kotlin (remove kotlin-android plugin), migrate to new AGP DSL, migrate kapt to KSP or legacy-kapt, update BuildConfig syntax, clean up gradle.properties flags.

assertions.description: Mentions KSP or Hilt version requirements

evals.prompt: How do I verify my AGP 9 migration was successful?
evals.expected_output: Run ./gradlew help to verify Gradle setup, ./gradlew build --dry-run to verify task graph, and check that Gradle IDE sync succeeds.

should_not_trigger: How do I make my app edge-to-edge?
Migrate my XML layout to Jetpack Compose
Set up ProGuard keep rules for my release build
How do I use BLoC pattern in Flutter?
